name: l2_powered_cruise_wake_footprint
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseWakeFootprint derives cruise slipstream contraction wake skew angle sweep distance mass-flow and local skew-wake probe targets.
note: Primary audit surface for forward-flight skew-wake footprint targets.

name: l2_powered_cruise_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSourceMap supplies cruise thrust pressure jump induced velocity far-wake velocity edgewise advance and source-term rows.
note: Powered cruise source-map input.

name: l2_powered_source_request_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceRequestPlan supplies static L2 grid cell size and request envelope dimensions for future skew-wake probes.
note: Grid envelope input for skew distance in-cell metrics.

name: l2_actuator_disk_calibration
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskCalibration supplies the actuator-disk momentum-theory velocity and power closure basis.
note: Momentum-theory reference used by this footprint.

name: l2_actuator_disk_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskSourceMap supplies per-rotor center axis force and moment source geometry.
note: Source geometry basis for the powered cruise map.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream CFD target for future powered cruise skew-wake validation.
note: Upstream CFD target for future local skew-wake validation.

name: method
value: ideal actuator disk uses disk-plane vi far wake 2vi and contracted far wake area A over 2 while forward flight combines axial wake speed with freestream speed to derive skew angle sweep distance and centerline length
note: Method row documenting the cruise skew-wake footprint derivation.
